title: Overhead View of Colorful Plant-Based Quinoa Bowl with Roasted Vegetables and Avocado
description: Top view of a vibrant plant-based meal bowl featuring quinoa, roasted broccoli, cauliflower, sweet potato, avocado slices topped with black sesame seeds, cherry tomatoes, leafy greens, hummus with olive oil and paprika, pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, diced cucumber, radish, and red onion on a rustic wooden surface. Accompanied by a small bowl of dressing and a wooden spoon on a gray cloth napkin. Bright natural lighting highlights the fresh, colorful ingredients and textures.
